My Ladamma  ·  My Sister  ·  My Forever Friend ❤️

✦ Memory Journey ✦

Our Beautiful Memories

Birthday Magic ✨

Look at that smile! Fireworks in the sky, joy in your heart — this is exactly who you are, Ladamma.

Dressed Up Together 💕

Side by side, all dressed up — some moments are just too precious to ever forget.

Festival Moments 🪔

Traditional colours, golden jewellery, and our smiles — festivals feel complete when you are there.

"Every childhood memory becomes priceless because you are in it."

Princess Sruthi 👑

Happy Birthday Sruthi! The whole world should know how special you are — because you truly are.

Growing Up Together 🌟

Every year brings new adventures, new smiles — and always, always, we face them together.

Celebration Time 🎉

A tiara suits you perfectly, Ladamma — because in my heart you have always been royalty.

"No matter how old we grow, you will always be my little Ladamma."

✦ Written With Love ✦

💌 A Letter From Your Brother
💛
Happy Birthday
My Dear Ladamma ❤️

Sruthi, you are one of the greatest gifts life has given me.

 

Thank you for your love,

your care,

your support,

and all the beautiful memories we share.

 

No matter where life takes us,

you will always be my little Ladamma.

 

I pray that happiness,

success,

health,

and endless smiles follow you every day.

 

May every dream in your heart come true.

Love you forever. ❤️
Your Brother
👑
Happy Birthday
Sruthi ❤️
Forever My Ladamma
💛 Happiness 🌸 Health ⭐ Success 💫 Joy ❤️ Love 👑 Glory

Happy Birthday, Sruthi Ladamma ❤️
